revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Republic of China (1912–1949)]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Republic of China (1912–1949)]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{ {{{1<noinclude> |country showdata </noinclude>}}} | alias = {{#ifeq:{{{variant|}}}|1912|Beiyang government|{{#ifeq:{{{variant|}}}|1928|Nationalist government|Republic of China (1912–1949)}}}} | shortname alias = China | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-1912 = Flag of the Republic of China 1912-1928.svg | link alias-1912 = Beiyang government | flag alias-1928 = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-1928 = Nationalist government | flag alias-military = Flag of the Republic of China Army.svg | link alias-military = National Revolutionary Army | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of China Army.svg | link alias-army = Republic of China Army | flag alias-army old = 十九星旗.svg | link alias-army old = Beiyang Army | flag alias-naval= Naval Jack of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-naval = Republic of China Navy | link alias-navy = Republic of China Navy | flag alias-navy= Naval Jack of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-air force = Republic of China Air Forces Flag (1937).svg | link alias-air force = Republic of China Air Force | flag alias-air force old = Flag of the Republic of China 1912-1928.svg | link alias-air force old = Beiyang Army | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-football = China {{{mw|}}} national football team | name alias-football = China | link alias-tennis = China {{{mw}}} Cup team | name alias-tennis = China | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1912 | var2 = 1928 | var3 = army old | var4 = air force old | var5 = civil | related1 = Republic of China | related2 = China | related3 = Taiwan | related4 =Beiyang government | related5 =Provisional Government of the Republic of China (1912) | cat = China republic 1912 </noinclude> }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_China_%281912%E2%80%931949%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
